verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Sometimes we get together For a fellowshipping time, And just about the time we start, It's time to say "Good bye"; But one day there'll be a meeting When time will be no more, When the Bride's caught up together Over on the other shore.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We're gonna be caught up together To meet Him in the air, And we'll be changed in a moment No more parting there, We will be ever together The crown of life we'll share; We're gonna be caught up To meet Him in the air.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Well, I love all my brothers and sisters in God's chosen family, To shake your hand and say 'God bless you' is a great joy to me; But we're looking for a time when we'll leave our troubles and care, And we'll join together with the saints in that meeting in the air.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There is going to be a meeting in the air And we'll be caught up To meet Him in the air We will be ever together The crown of life we'll share; We're gonna be caught up To meet Him in the air.
